title: International User Sign-Up Redirect and Cookie Workflow
story: As a user from a country outside the US or Canada, I want to receive clear messaging that the software is not yet available in my region when I attempt to sign up, so that I have proper expectations and do not repeatedly try to register.
description:
Implement a workflow for international (non-US/CA) users who attempt to sign up via the beta form. When a user from an unsupported geography submits the form, they are redirected to a secondary landing page explaining regional availability. A 1-hour cookie is set so that if they return to the sign-up page, they are automatically redirected.

### Problem
International users were signing up multiple times and generating support emails complaining about access issues. The existing workflow did not clearly communicate the geographic restriction before or during sign-up, causing confusion and risking negative reviews.

### Solution
- After form submission, detect the user's geography
- If outside US/CA, redirect to a secondary landing page with availability messaging
- Set a 1-hour cookie to prevent re-submission and auto-redirect on return visits
- Block the verification email for non-US/CA users
acceptance_criteria: Non-US/CA users are redirected to a secondary landing page after form submission
Secondary page clearly communicates regional availability status
A 1-hour cookie is set to auto-redirect on return visits to the sign-up page
Cookie expires after 1 hour allowing the user to try again
US and CA users continue through the normal sign-up flow unaffected
Repeated form submissions from international users are reduced
ux_changes: International users see a dedicated landing page explaining that DataTools Pro is not yet available in their region. Return visits within 1 hour auto-redirect to this page instead of showing the sign-up form.
middleware_changes: Geography detection on form submission triggers either the normal sign-up flow (US/CA) or the international redirect with cookie setting. Cookie-based redirect logic added to the beta sign-up page.
implementation_notes: Cookie is scoped to datatoolspro.com (not app.datatoolspro.com). The redirect landing page was created within WordPress. Tested with international form submissions.
comment_summary: Developer implemented the cookie-based redirect for non-US/CA users. Tested and confirmed working with a 1-hour cookie window.
